---
title: "Personal website"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: pfp.JPG
  links: 
    - text: Creative Website
      href: https://sophiangelene18.wordpress.com/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/sophiangelene
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/sophiangelene18
    - icon: inbox-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:sophiangelene@g.ucla.edu
toc: false
---

insert intro

DOWNLOAD [Resume](/resume.pdf)

## Education
insert education
